name: Konrad Curze, Your Monstrous Primarch!
description:
"OH MY GOD, IT'S WORSE THAN WE THOUGHT! THEY MADE HER EMO!" -South Park Guy #37462

[{[ FEM-PRIMARCH 8/20 ]}]

Play, so basically, I had to go through some Lore on Konrad and GOD is it sad. I kinda thought that his whole thing was just being evil. He's only kinda evil! It's just his Legion that's tucked up! And not because of him, for a matter of fact! Free my mans bru.
